title: stelis jurisdicciensis
intro: Stelis jurisdicciensis, also known as the Stelis orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Some of the health benefits associated with Stelis jurisdicciensis include wound healing, anti-aging, and antimicrobial resistance prevention. Herbal preparations of Stelis jurisdicciensis are typically made by drying and processing the plant's aerial parts, which can be used in teas, infusions, or topical applications.
